news.title: Fed's Barr: Easing liquidity regulations to reduce balance sheet not advisable
news.desc: Fed Governor Michael Barr said lowering liquidity rules to shrink the Fed's balance sheet is a bad idea and could undermine financial system safety. Reducing liquidity requirements would heighten stability risks; a reduced balance sheet may boost demand for Fed liquidity facilities.

news.title: 美联储再次大幅削减国库券购买规模，RMP月度购债降至100亿美元
news.desc: 美联储5月13日宣布将本月RMP（准备金管理购买）国库券购买规模从4月的250亿美元进一步削减至约100亿美元，降幅达60%，为RMP计划启动以来第二次大幅缩减。此举反映该旨在补充金融体系准备金、降低短期融资成本的计划进一步放缓，银行准备金已回升至约3.05万亿美元。

news.title: Federal Reserve H.4.1 Release: Factors Affecting Reserve Balances (May 21, 2026)
news.desc: Latest Fed weekly balance sheet data (week ended May 20, 2026). Reserve Bank credit at ~$6.667 trillion; Securities held outright at ~$6.436 trillion, including $4.453T in Treasury securities and $1.981T in MBS. Key weekly and year-over-year changes tracked for reserves, TGA, and ON RRP balances.
